# Act 4: The Integrated Loop {.section}

---

## 18. From Problem to Knowledge

::: {.flow}
Problem -> Discussion -> Hypothesis -> Prototype -> Experiment -> Metric -> Decision -> Knowledge
:::

---

## 19. Experiments Beat Large Upfront Decisions

::: {.toc-only}
Connect risk-first exploration, reversibility, and feedback over opinion.
:::

---

## 20. Architecture Becomes Observable

::: {.toc-only}
Show architecture as dependency management, invariant placement, and blast
radius reduction.
:::

---

## 21. Metrics Become Causal, Not Decorative

::: {.toc-only}
Tie KPI trees to hypotheses and experiments so metrics can explain decisions.
:::

---

## 22. Decisions Become Traceable

::: {.toc-only}
Show how evidence, trade-offs, and canonical references survive beyond meetings.
:::
